description:
# Why

bl-f37b shipped `delivered_in_resolved_repo` in `bl show --json`, but the
text renderer was not updated. `render_show_relations::write_delivered_repo`
still prints only the static `task.delivered_repo` field, which is whatever
the *closer* tagged at close time (auto = current clone, or `--delivered-repo`
override per bl-733e). An operator running `bl show --resolve-remote` against
a hub gets the cross-repo resolution in the JSON but no visible signal in the
human output.

The two values usually agree, but they intentionally can disagree:

- A bridge clone (README §Bridging) closed someone else's task and either
  used `--delivered-repo` or accepted the auto-tag; later, a different
  reader on a different clone resolves the sha via a *third* repo whose
  history actually contains it.
- The static `delivered_repo` was written by a pre-bl-f37b `bl` (null) and
  the remote-resolution fallback synthesizes one from the resolver's
  search path.

Both cases are exactly what bl-f37b was designed to surface; not showing
them in text is a soft regression from the bl-7523 'delivered repo:' line.

# Scope

- Thread the resolved `Delivery` (which already carries `resolved_repo`)
  through to `write_delivered_repo` — it currently reads only from the
  task. The renderer already receives the `Delivery` for the delivered
  line; small refactor.
- When `resolved_repo` is `Some` and differs from `task.delivered_repo`,
  print a second line (or a parenthetical on the existing line) naming
  the resolved-through repo. Exact shape TBD — favor the
  least-disruptive of:
    - `delivered repo: <static>  (resolved via <resolved>)`
    - or a separate `resolved via: <resolved>` line below
  Match the existing column-aligned key style.
- Suppress duplication: when `resolved_repo == task.delivered_repo` (the
  common case), the rendered output stays byte-identical to today.

# Out of scope

JSON contract is unchanged — already correct since bl-f37b. This is
purely the text-rendering parity.

# Origin

Bl-f37b review pass — flagged 'no render-layer change for
delivered_in_resolved_repo' and deferred to keep that ball scoped.
title: bl show text: surface resolved_repo when it diverges from the static delivered_repo
